requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence for Off-Board EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 非车载电动汽车充电设备EMC证据
requirement_topic.zht: 非車載電動汽車充電設備EMC證據

summary.en: South Africa EV charger submissions should include EMC evidence suitable for the charger type, installation environment, cable lengths, radio modules, and grid connection. IEC 61851-21-2 is the product-specific EMC standard for off-board EV charging systems; generic IEC/CISPR EMC standards may also be requested by conformity assessors, installers, project owners, or utilities depending on the installation.
summary.zh: 南非电动汽车充电桩提交资料应包括适合充电设备类型、安装环境、电缆长度、无线模块和电网接入方式的EMC证据。IEC 61851-21-2是非车载电动汽车充电系统的产品专项EMC标准；合格评定方、安装方、项目业主或公用事业也可能根据安装场景要求通用IEC/CISPR EMC标准。
summary.zht: 南非電動汽車充電樁提交資料應包括適合充電設備類型、安裝環境、電纜長度、無線模組和電網接入方式的EMC證據。IEC 61851-21-2是非車載電動汽車充電系統的產品專項EMC標準；合格評定方、安裝方、項目業主或公用事業也可能根據安裝場景要求通用IEC/CISPR EMC標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
IEC 61000 and CISPR test methods where specified by the conformity route or project
Wireless or radio approvals where the charger integrates radio modules

summary.en: China EMC evidence may include GB/T 18487.2, GB 17625 series harmonic limits, GB/T 17799 series generic EMC standards, GB 4824 radio-disturbance evidence, and radio-module approvals. These documents need edition, test-setup, voltage, frequency, and port-definition review before being reused for South Africa.
summary.zh: 中国EMC证据可能包括GB/T 18487.2、GB 17625系列谐波限值、GB/T 17799系列通用EMC标准、GB 4824无线电骚扰证据以及无线模块批准。这些文件在南非复用前，需要审查版本、试验配置、电压、频率和端口定义。
summary.zht: 中國EMC證據可能包括GB/T 18487.2、GB 17625系列諧波限值、GB/T 17799系列通用EMC標準、GB 4824無線電騷擾證據以及無線模組批准。這些文件在南非複用前，需要審查版本、試驗配置、電壓、頻率和端口定義。

gap.en: The gap is not only limit values; it is test configuration. South Africa-bound evidence should address EVSE-specific ports, charging cables, communication ports, enclosure variants, AC and DC operating modes, conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, surge, EFT, ESD, voltage dips, and any integrated cellular, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, RFID, or payment terminal module.
gap.zh: 差距不仅是限值，还包括试验配置。面向南非的证据应覆盖EVSE专项端口、充电电缆、通信端口、外壳变体、交流和直流工作模式、传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、浪涌、电快速瞬变、静电放电、电压暂降，以及任何集成的蜂窝、Wi-Fi、蓝牙、RFID或支付终端模块。
gap.zht: 差距不僅是限值，還包括試驗配置。面向南非的證據應覆蓋EVSE專項端口、充電電纜、通訊端口、外殼變體、交流和直流工作模式、傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、浪湧、電快速瞬變、靜電放電、電壓暫降，以及任何集成的蜂窩、Wi-Fi、藍牙、RFID或支付終端模組。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by an applicable compulsory specification, LOA route, radio approval, installation approval, utility requirement, procurement rule, or contract; IEC EMC standards are otherwise voluntary technical evidence routes
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T and GB EMC evidence may be required for China certification but requires mapping before South Africa use

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Reuse China EMC reports only after confirming edition alignment, EVSE-specific test setup, South Africa installation conditions, and any radio-module approval route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 复用中国EMC报告前，应先确认版本一致性、EVSE专项试验配置、南非安装条件以及任何无线模块批准路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 複用中國EMC報告前，應先確認版本一致性、EVSE專項試驗配置、南非安裝條件以及任何無線模組批准路徑。
